final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [7:0] C,
    output [7:0] X
);wire [7:0] and_result;
    wire [7:0] or_result;

    // Use generic logic gates instead of missing modules
    assign and_result = A & B; // AND operation
    assign or_result = B | C;  // OR operation

    assign X = and_result ^ or_result; // XOR between results

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
